chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1700 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.571/2020 (151, CPC) 11.03.2020 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Liaqat Ali Malik, Special Prosecutor NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of the surety. It appears that interim pre-arrest bail was granted to petitioner Abdul Khalique Dayo by this Court at Principal Seat, Karachi vide order dated 28.08.2019 in the sum of Rs.5,00,000/- (five lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. In compliance of the Court’s order dated 28.08.2019, surety was furnished by Muhammad Rafique by depositing cash amount of Rs.5,00,000/- (five lac). It is stated that petitioner has entered into plea bargain and that application has been accepted. This fact has been confirmed by Special Prosecutor NAB. Special Prosecutor NAB submits that petitioner is no more required. In the view of above, application for return of the surety amount is allowed. Office / Principal Seat, Karachi is directed to return the surety amount to the surety after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
